title: L20 1BX, European Metal Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/RP3794CG/V010
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: European Metal Recycling Limited   Installation name: Alexandra Building   Permit number: EPR/RP3794CG/V010   "
